title: ADR ODR India signs Memorandum of Understanding with Jindal Global Law School
description: ADR ODR India, represented by its CEO Pavani Sibal on behalf of ADRODR International, has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding with Professor C. Raj Kumar, Vice Chancellor of O.P. Jindal Global University and Jindal Global Law School.The signing ceremony was attended by several ambassadors serving as resident professors at the university and the Deans of all its multidisciplinary departments. The collaboration is structured around the following key objectives:Training and Professional Deve
